metadata.description: Personal Claude Code plugins by Charbel Wakim

plugins.name: session-continuity
plugins.description: Save a portable, human-readable snapshot of a conversation (/handoff) and pick it back up later (/pickup).

plugins.name: branch-cleanup
plugins.description: Safely delete branches already merged into a base branch (local and remote), protecting long-lived branches and never force-deleting.

plugins.name: memory-gardener
plugins.description: Audit and prune Claude Code's persistent memory (/garden): verify stale claims against the project, catch contradictions and duplicates, fix them through one confirmed docket. Session-start nudge + optional scheduled dry-run audits.
